SEARCH
Package io.github.natanimn.telebof.types.inline

Class InlineQueryResultArticle

java.lang.Object
io.github.natanimn.telebof.types.inline.InlineQueryResultArticle
All Implemented Interfaces:
InlineQueryResult, Serializable
public class InlineQueryResultArticle extends Object implements Serializable, InlineQueryResult
Represents a link to an article or web page.
Since:
3 March 2025

    • InlineQueryResultArticle

      public InlineQueryResultArticle(String id, String title, InputTextMessageContent inputMessageContent)
      Required
      Parameters:
      id - Unique identifier for this result, 1-64 Bytes
      title - Title of the result
      inputMessageContent - Content of the message to be sent
